de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.boollattice

Class BooleanLattice

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.AbstractDomainLattice<Boolean>
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.boollattice.BooleanLattice
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    PartialComparator<AbstractDomainElement>, Iterable<AbstractDomainElement>

    public class BooleanLattice
extends AbstractDomainLattice<Boolean>
    A simple lattice for booleans.
    Author:
    Dominic Scheurer

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.PartialComparator

        PartialComparator.PartialComparisonResult

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static AbstractDomainElement[] ABSTRACT_DOMAIN_ELEMS
      All elements of this abstract domain.
      private static BooleanLattice INSTANCE
      The singleton instance of the lattice.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor and Description
      private BooleanLattice()
      Private constructor: Singleton.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      AbstractDomainElement abstractFrom(Boolean elem)
      Abstracts from a given element of the concrete domain by returning a suitable abstract element.
      static BooleanLattice getInstance() 
      Iterator<AbstractDomainElement> iterator()
      Iterates through the abstract domain elements of this abstract domain starting by the smallest element; if an element b is returned by the iterator after an element a, the either compare(a,b) == LTE, or compare(a,b) == UNDEF must hold (i.e., b may not be smaller than a).
      AbstractDomainElement join(AbstractDomainElement elem1, AbstractDomainElement elem2)
      A lattice join operation; finds an abstract element that is the least upper bound of the set consisting of the elements a and b.

      • Methods inherited from class de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.AbstractDomainLattice

        compare

    • Field Detail

      • ABSTRACT_DOMAIN_ELEMS

        public static final AbstractDomainElement[] ABSTRACT_DOMAIN_ELEMS
        All elements of this abstract domain.

      • INSTANCE

        private static final BooleanLattice INSTANCE
        The singleton instance of the lattice.

    • Constructor Detail

      • BooleanLattice

        private BooleanLattice()
        Private constructor: Singleton.

    • Method Detail

      • getInstance

        public static BooleanLattice getInstance()
        Returns:
        The singleton instance of this lattice.

      • abstractFrom

        public AbstractDomainElement abstractFrom(Boolean elem)
        Description copied from class: AbstractDomainLattice
        Abstracts from a given element of the concrete domain by returning a suitable abstract element. The returned abstract element should be as precise as possible, that is there should not be a smaller abstract element that also describes the concrete element.
        Specified by:
        abstractFrom in class AbstractDomainLattice<Boolean>
        Parameters:
        elem - Element to abstract from.
        Returns:
        A suitable abstract domain element.

      • join

        public AbstractDomainElement join(AbstractDomainElement elem1,
                                  AbstractDomainElement elem2)
        Description copied from class: AbstractDomainLattice
        A lattice join operation; finds an abstract element that is the least upper bound of the set consisting of the elements a and b.
        Specified by:
        join in class AbstractDomainLattice<Boolean>
        Parameters:
        elem1 - First element to find the least upper bound for.
        elem2 - Second element to find the least upper bound for.
        Returns:
        The least upper bound of the set consisting of the elements a and b.

      • iterator

        public Iterator<AbstractDomainElement> iterator()
        Description copied from class: AbstractDomainLattice
        Iterates through the abstract domain elements of this abstract domain starting by the smallest element; if an element b is returned by the iterator after an element a, the either compare(a,b) == LTE, or compare(a,b) == UNDEF must hold (i.e., b may not be smaller than a).
        Specified by:
        iterator in interface Iterable<AbstractDomainElement>
        Specified by:
        iterator in class AbstractDomainLattice<Boolean>
